name: phase2_wholesequence_practical_validation
summary: Whole-sequence practical validation scenarios on the clean Phase2 sequence baseline.

scenarios.name: phase2-stage-lighting-pass
scenarios.analyzePrompt: Analyze the current song for sections, beat windows, phrase cues, and energy shifts.
scenarios.strongPrompt: Design the full song more like a stage-lighting cue stack with restrained washes, clearer key-vs-fill hierarchy, and stronger finale punch.
scenarios.weakPrompt: Keep the full song as one broad even look across the yard with minimal hierarchy and mostly uniform effect language.

scenarios.name: phase2-composition-pass
scenarios.analyzePrompt: Analyze the current song for sections, beat windows, phrase cues, and energy shifts.
scenarios.strongPrompt: Use the perimeter props to frame the song while the centerpiece props take over the key reveals and choruses.
scenarios.weakPrompt: Keep the full song visually even so the perimeter and centerpiece props all share the same emphasis most of the time.

scenarios.name: phase2-motion-language-pass
scenarios.analyzePrompt: Analyze the current song for sections, beat windows, phrase cues, and energy shifts.
scenarios.strongPrompt: Shape the full song with smooth connected transitions, broader cinematic motion, and a more flowing rise into the final chorus.
scenarios.weakPrompt: Make the full song choppier and more staccato with punchy pulse changes, sharper accents, and less connected motion between sections.

scenarios.name: phase2-render-discipline-pass
scenarios.analyzePrompt: Analyze the current song for sections, beat windows, phrase cues, and energy shifts.
scenarios.strongPrompt: Design the full song with a restrained glowing base, smoother texture transitions, and selective sparkle only on the bigger lifts so the render feels polished instead of busy.
scenarios.weakPrompt: Keep changing textures aggressively across the whole song with busier sparkle, harder texture swaps, and less restraint in the base look.
